title: Property Consultant - Mahagun Group Capital India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Mahagun Group Capital India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at Mahagun Group Capital India are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mahagun Group Capital India:
Mahagun Group Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahagun Group Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
